name: chzzk
description: Personal Firefox WebExtension for tab-scoped CHZZK HLS session redirect hardening.

scripts.build: npm run build:runtime && web-ext build --overwrite-dest --artifacts-dir dist --source-dir . --ignore-files .github .git .hermes codex-security-scans docs node_modules ops package-lock.json package.json policy reg scripts src tests
scripts.lint:webext: web-ext lint --self-hosted --warnings-as-errors --source-dir . --ignore-files .github .git .hermes codex-security-scans docs node_modules ops package-lock.json package.json policy reg scripts src tests
scripts.verify: npm run format:check && npm run check:generated && npm run validate:manifest && npm run validate:project && npm run lint && npm run lint:webext && npm run test && npm run test:ops && npm run audit:deps && npm run build && npm run audit:package
